rationale: The citing paper gives this reference a concrete methodological role: in the preliminary study, it says prior research including Allen et al. (2018) was leveraged to build the LIWC coding dictionary for message frames. That coding setup is then used in the website text analysis and to inform experimental stimulus development, so the citation meaningfully informs study design. Although it is not a central theoretical target of extension, it is more than a passing background mention.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Allen et al. (2018) as an input for operationalizing message-frame coding (via LIWC dictionary development) in a new domain, global brand environmental sustainability messaging.
